name: Trancom Co., Ltd.
summary: Trancom Co., Ltd. provides various logistics services in Japan and internationally. It offers logistics center construction and operation services; transport matching and delivery services; and production contract and temporary staffing services. The company also provides personal delivery services; paid employment placement services; consulting services; automobile maintenance services; and freight and truck transportation services. In addition, it sells new and used cars; operates insurance agency business; and designs and develops software. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
